name: sec-opendata-th
description: Marketplace for the SEC OpenData Thailand plugin.

metadata.description: Claude-compatible plugin and SEC Open Data Thailand client for fund, bond, PVD, digital asset, Licence Check, One Report, and generic v1/v2 portal endpoints.

plugins.name: sec-opendata
plugins.description: Pull Thai SEC Open Data from api.sec.or.th across current portal categories and legacy fund endpoints.
